title: Friction Calibration Entry
description: One line of ~/.claude/plugins/data/vibe-cartographer/friction.calibration.jsonl. Written by /reflect's calibration check-in to mark friction entries as false_positive or to record missed friction (false_negative). Consumed by /evolve as a weighting input.

timestamp.description: ISO datetime when the calibration entry was written.

plugin_version.description: Vibe Cartographer version that emitted the calibration entry.

friction_entry_ref.description: Composite reference to the friction.jsonl entry being calibrated. Triple of (timestamp, friction_type, sessionUUID) uniquely identifies an entry without requiring a stable line ID.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the referenced friction entry.

sessionUUID.description: sessionUUID of the referenced friction entry.

calibration.description: false_positive zeroes the entry's weight in /evolve. false_negative records friction the logger missed and the builder described after the fact.

builder_note.description: Optional free-text note from the builder explaining the calibration.
